summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements with reasonable coverage. REQ-1 through REQ-6 are largely addressed, but several specific acceptance criteria have gaps. Notable missing items include: the Memory Jar public/private toggle on the profile page, the notification to original poster when a deed is saved, the PostCard Save to Memory Jar action button, the MemoryJarView component, the Report Card kindness matches stat, and full weekly refresh logic. The Profile component is not shown in the diff so REQ-2 fixes cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Users can save a post to their Memory Jar from the feed via the PostCard action button
missing_requirements.reason: No PostCard modification showing a Save to Memory Jar action button is included in the diff. MemoryJarPostCard exists but the feed-level save button is not shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: A notification is sent to the original poster when their deed is saved to someone's Memory Jar
missing_requirements.reason: No notification dispatch logic for memory jar saves is visible in backend/main.mo or any frontend mutation hook in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Memory Jar entries appear in the MemoryJarView component with saved posts displayed as polaroid-style cards
missing_requirements.reason: The MemoryJarPostCard component is implemented, but no MemoryJarView component file appears in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Memory Jar has a public/private toggle accessible from the profile page
missing_requirements.reason: The isPublic field exists on MemoryJarEntry and is rendered on MemoryJarPostCard, but no UI toggle for the Memory Jar overall visibility on the Profile page is shown in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Profile page renders without a blank screen for authenticated users with all required sections present
missing_requirements.reason: The Profile component is referenced in App.tsx but no Profile.tsx diff is included in the file changes, making it impossible to verify the profile page fix from the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: The card displays weekly stats including kindness matches
missing_requirements.reason: ReportCard.tsx computes grade from postsCount, deedsCompleted, and likesReceived but does not include kindness matches as a displayed or computed stat.

missing_requirements.requirement: Report card data refreshes weekly based on the current week's activity
missing_requirements.reason: The weekRange is displayed in the UI but no backend logic for resetting or refreshing weekly stats is visible in the truncated main.mo diff.

hallucinated_features.description: AllInOneHub component with a full hub navigation grid linking to Love Notes, Deed of the Day, Kindness Matches, Blog, Marketplace, Live, and Space
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention an All-in-One Hub page or navigation grid component.

hallucinated_features.description: FollowersModal and FollowingModal components as separate dialog overlays
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks to display follower and following counts on the profile page. Separate modal dialogs for listing followers and following were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Visual filter options including Warm, Cool, Bright, and Vintage in CreatePostModal
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 only requests category selection in CreatePostModal. Image and video filter options were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: ReelHome page component registered as the root route
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a Reel or ReelHome page. This feature is not part of any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Gate component registered as a /gate route
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a Gate page or route.
